title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. tomentosa
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. tomentosa, also known as woolly scabious, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scabiosa columbaria subsp. tomentosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
